title: biscutella raphanifolia
intro: Biscutella raphanifolia, also known as the Biscutella or Corn Marigold, is a plant species in the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Biscutella raphanifolia are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Biscutella raphanifolia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
